description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages version, build, test, behead, and deploy, and set the global variables GODOT_VERSION='3.2' and GIT_LFS_SKIP_SMUDGE='1'. In the version stage add a version-extractor:version job that runs on an alpine image and writes version.txt with the tag if present or the short commit SHA otherwise. In the build stage add linux-client:build, linux-server:build, mac-client:build, mac-server:build, windows-client:build, and windows-server:build jobs, all using the scramblesim/godot-desktop-export:$GODOT_VERSION image, each executing the script sequence: "ls -la", "mv version.txt Scramble-$TYPE/meta/version.txt", "mkdir -p export", "cd Scramble-$TYPE", "godot -v --export $PLATFORM ../Scramble-$TYPE-$PLATFORM.$EXTENSION", and a test that exits with error if the exported file does not exist; each job sets its own TYPE, PLATFORM, and EXTENSION variables, depends on version-extractor:version, and publishes artifacts (expire in 1 hour, name Scramble-$TYPE-$PLATFORM-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA, paths Scramble-$TYPE-$PLATFORM.$EXTENSION and Scramble-$TYPE-$PLATFORM.pck). Add a linux-server:behead job in the behead stage that runs on scramblesim/godot-server-converter:$GODOT_VERSION, moves /Godot_server.x64 to Scramble-server-linux.x64, produces similar artifacts, depends on linux-server:build, and is configured with only tags and except branches. In the deploy stage add a linux-docker-server:deploy job using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service that moves the built files, builds a Docker image scramblesim/scramble-server:$VERSION with build‑args TYPE=server PLATFORM=linux EXTENSION=x64, logs into Docker Hub with $DOCKER_HUB_USER/$DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD, and pushes the image; also add a releases:deploy job using the everpeace/curl-jq image that installs zip, runs .gitlab/zipReleaseFiles.sh and .gitlab/uploadReleaseFiles.sh to package and upload all build artifacts, both jobs run only on tags. Finally, add three test jobs (file-naming:test, global-logging:test, license-header:test) that run on alpine, inherit GIT_LFS_SKIP_SMUDGE, and execute their respective .gitlab/*.sh scripts.
